---
title: Posts
listing:
  id: sample-listings
  contents: posts
  feed:
    type: full
    title: "Notes from Athi"
    description: "Technical notes and essays from Athi."
    categories: [R]
  sort: "date desc"
  type: grid
  categories: true
  sort-ui: [title]
  filter-ui: true
  fields: [image, date, title, subtitle, description, categories, author]
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: false
---

::: {#sample-listings}
:::
